MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
David Blum, Esq. of the Law Office of Timothy Hall, Tel. 310.203.8411, appearing for the Plaintiff;

Hearing re: DEFENDANT GOFORWARD, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
